segment: #2 The Berserker Probe Scenario.
scene_text: These probes wouldn't need to be massive death stars.
prompt: 2D Western Cartoon animation. Wide CHANGE shot. Viewer positioned as a surprised witness. Left side of frame: a massive cartoon Death Star shape — huge, round, covered in cartoon weapon ports, glowing menacingly. A bold red X overlaps it. Right side of frame: a tiny, compact, sleek angular probe in dark gray — barely the size of a pebble in comparison — with glowing red sensor eye. An equals sign or arrow between them suggests the small probe is just as dangerous. Background is deep alien space with purple nebulae and electric blue star clusters. No characters. Wide framing. Bold wobbly black outlines, flat cel-shading, no gradients, no text anywhere.

segment: #2 The Berserker Probe Scenario.
scene_text: They could be small, stealthy, and dormant. They might lurk in the oar clouds of star systems,
prompt: 2D Western Cartoon animation. Cosmic wide shot. Viewer positioned as a tiny observer. A cartoon star system at center — yellow star, orbiting planets. Surrounding the system at great distance, barely visible in the dark purple space, are multiple tiny angular probe shapes hiding in the dark — rendered as nearly-invisible dark gray silhouettes. They are dormant, lurking, half-hidden in swirling alien cloud material — the Oort cloud rendered as a distant hazy ring of flat cartoon rock-and-ice shapes. The probes blend into the darkness. Background is deep alien purple-black space. No characters. Cosmic framing. Bold wobbly black outlines, flat cel-shading, no gradients, no text anywhere.

segment: #2 The Berserker Probe Scenario.

scene_text: Listening for the telltale

segment: #2 The Berserker Probe Scenario.
scene_text: chemical signatures of an industrial atmosphere.
prompt: 2D Western Cartoon animation. Wide final climax shot. Viewer positioned as a powerless witness. Center frame: Earth — a small flat blue-green circle — sits in the middle of deep alien black space. Rising from it are cartoon factory chimneys emitting glowing toxic green chemical clouds, radio wave rings in neon green, and tiny nuclear burst shapes — all broadcasting outward in every direction. Surrounding Earth in the dark space at various distances: multiple dormant berserker probe shapes in dark gray, all with red sensor eyes now lit and ACTIVE, all angled toward Earth. The probes form a loose encirclement. The net is closing. Maximum dread. No human characters. Cosmic framing. Bold wobbly black outlines, flat cel-shading, no gradients, no text anywhere.
